description: Act as a Clinical Data Engineer. Generate a sample dataset of physiological vital signs using a Simulated Multiparameter Monitor and a Simulated Pulse Oximeter. Extract the Heart Rate (MDC_ECG_HEART_RATE) and SpO2 (MDC_PULS_OXIM_SAT_O2) readings from the log file at /home/ga/openice/logs/openice.log into a CSV file at /home/ga/Desktop/vital_signs_dataset.csv. The CSV must use the header 'Timestamp,Metric,Value' and contain real data values from the simulation.
